text:
Created attachment 144790
Update to 0.4.8 release

- Update to 0.4.8 release
- Convert to USES=tar:bzip2
- Change CONFLICTS to CONFLICTS_INSTALL
- Add Traditional Chinese translation

Build tested with portlint and poudriere testport on amd64 for head, stable/10,
releng/9.3, releng/8.4. Runtime tested on stable/10 amd64.

Thanks!
